mapper.select:
SELECT o.ORDER_ID, o.ORDER_NO, o.ORDER_DT,
o.ORDER_STATUS_CD, os.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS ORDER_STATUS_NAME,
o.DELIVERY_TYPE_CD, dt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS DELIVERY_TYPE_NAME,
o.DELIVERY_STATUS_CD, ds.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS DELIVERY_STATUS_NAME,
o.GOODS_TOTAL_AMT, o.DELIVERY_TOTAL_AMT, o.DISCOUNT_TOTAL_AMT, o.VAT_TOTAL_AMT, o.PAY_TOTAL_AMT,
o.BUYER_MEMBER_ID, bm.COMPANY_NAME AS BUYER_COMPANY_NAME,
o.REGION_SIDO_CD, o.REGION_SIGUNGU_CD, o.RECEIVER_NAME, o.RECEIVER_MOBILE,
/* 대표 상품명 (첫 라인) */ ( SELECT oi.SALES_PROD_NAME FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM oi WHERE oi.ORDER_ID = o.ORDER_ID AND oi.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY oi.LINE_NO ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS FIRST_SALES_PROD_NAME,
/* 라인수 */ ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM oi WHERE oi.ORDER_ID = o.ORDER_ID AND oi.DEL_YN = 'N' ) AS ITEM_COUNT,
/* 총수량 */ ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(oi.ORDER_QTY), 0) FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM oi WHERE oi.ORDER_ID = o.ORDER_ID AND oi.DEL_YN = 'N' ) AS TOTAL_ORDER_QTY
FROM TB_ORDER o LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER bm ON bm.MEMBER_ID = o.BUYER_MEMBER_ID
LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE os ON os.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'ORDER_STATUS' AND os.CODE_ID = 'ORDER_STATUS' AND os.DETAIL_CODE_ID = o.ORDER_STATUS_CD AND os.USE_YN = 'Y' AND os.DEL_YN = 'N'
LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE dt ON dt.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'DELIVERY_TYPE' AND dt.CODE_ID = 'DELIVERY_TYPE' AND dt.DETAIL_CODE_ID = o.DELIVERY_TYPE_CD AND dt.USE_YN = 'Y' AND dt.DEL_YN = 'N'
LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE ds ON ds.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'DELIVERY_STATUS' AND ds.CODE_ID = 'DELIVERY_STATUS' AND ds.DETAIL_CODE_ID = o.DELIVERY_STATUS_CD AND ds.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ds.DEL_YN = 'N'
ORDER BY o.ORDER_ID DESC
LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ORDER o LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER bm ON bm.MEMBER_ID = o.BUYER_MEMBER_ID

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.GOODS_TOTAL_AMT), 0) AS SUM_GOODS_TOTAL_AMT, COALESCE(SUM(o.DELIVERY_TOTAL_AMT), 0) AS SUM_DELIVERY_TOTAL_AMT, COALESCE(SUM(o.DISCOUNT_TOTAL_AMT), 0) AS SUM_DISCOUNT_TOTAL_AMT, COALESCE(SUM(o.PAY_TOTAL_AMT), 0) AS SUM_PAY_TOTAL_AMT FROM TB_ORDER o LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER bm ON bm.MEMBER_ID = o.BUYER_MEMBER_ID

SELECT o.ORDER_ID, o.ORDER_NO, o.ORDER_DT, o.ORDER_STATUS_CD, os.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS ORDER_STATUS_NAME, o.DELIVERY_TYPE_CD, dt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS DELIVERY_TYPE_NAME, o.DELIVERY_STATUS_CD, ds.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS DELIVERY_STATUS_NAME, o.GOODS_TOTAL_AMT, o.DELIVERY_TOTAL_AMT, o.DISCOUNT_TOTAL_AMT, o.VAT_TOTAL_AMT, o.PAY_TOTAL_AMT, o.BUYER_MEMBER_ID, bm.COMPANY_NAME AS BUYER_COMPANY_NAME, bm.MEMBER_NAME AS BUYER_NAME, bm.MOBILE AS BUYER_MOBILE, bm.EMAIL AS BUYER_EMAIL, o.REGION_SIDO_CD, o.REGION_SIGUNGU_CD, o.RECEIVER_NAME, o.RECEIVER_MOBILE, o.ZIP_CODE AS RECEIVER_ZIP_CODE, o.RECEIVER_ADDR1, o.RECEIVER_ADDR2, o.DELIVERY_MEMO FROM TB_ORDER o LEFT JOIN TB_MEMBER bm ON bm.MEMBER_ID = o.BUYER_MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_code os ON os.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'ORDER_STATUS' AND os.CODE_ID = 'ORDER_STATUS' AND os.DETAIL_CODE_ID = o.ORDER_STATUS_CD AND os.USE_YN = 'Y' AND os.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_code dt ON dt.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'DELIVERY_TYPE' AND dt.CODE_ID = 'DELIVERY_TYPE' AND dt.DETAIL_CODE_ID = o.DELIVERY_TYPE_CD AND dt.USE_YN = 'Y' AND dt.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_code ds ON ds.CODE_GROUP_ID = 'DELIVERY_STATUS' AND ds.CODE_ID = 'DELIVERY_STATUS' AND ds.DETAIL_CODE_ID = o.DELIVERY_STATUS_CD AND ds.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ds.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE o.ORDER_ID = #{orderId}

SELECT oi.ORDER_ITEM_ID, oi.ORDER_ID, oi.SALES_PROD_ID, oi.SALES_PROD_NAME, sp.REP_IMG_PATH AS SALES_PROD_MAIN_IMG_PATH, oi.SALES_PRICE, oi.ORDER_QTY, (oi.SALES_PRICE * oi.ORDER_QTY) AS SUPPLY_AMT, 0 AS VAT_AMT, /* VAT Logic needed? Using 0 for now or calc from price if tax-included */ oi.TOTAL_AMT, 0 AS ITEM_DISCOUNT_AMT, /* Column might not exist ? */ 0 AS ITEM_DELIVERY_AMT FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM oi LEFT JOIN TB_SALES_PRODUCT sp ON sp.SALES_PROD_ID = oi.SALES_PROD_ID WHERE oi.ORDER_ID = #{orderId} AND oi.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY oi.LINE_NO ASC
SELECT ORDER_ID, COURIER_CD, TRACKING_NO, DELIVERY_REGION_CD, SHIPPED_DT, DELIVERED_DT, USE_YN, DEL_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT FROM TB_ORDER_DELIVERY_PARCEL WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ORDER_DELIVERY_PARCEL ( ORDER_ID, COURIER_CD, TRACKING_NO, DELIVERY_REGION_CD, SHIPPED_DT, USE_YN, DEL_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{courierCd}, #{trackingNo}, #{deliveryRegionCd}, #{shippedDt}, 'Y', 'N', #{regId}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE COURIER_CD = #{courierCd}, TRACKING_NO = #{trackingNo}, DELIVERY_REGION_CD = #{deliveryRegionCd}, SHIPPED_DT = #{shippedDt}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT ORDER_ID, SHIPPING_METHOD_CD, FREIGHT_COMPANY_NAME, DRIVER_NAME, DRIVER_MOBILE, TRUCK_NO, DELIVERY_REGION_CD, SHIPPED_DT, ARRIVED_DT, USE_YN, DEL_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT FROM TB_ORDER_DELIVERY_FREIGHT WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ORDER_DELIVERY_FREIGHT ( ORDER_ID, SHIPPING_METHOD_CD, FREIGHT_COMPANY_NAME, DRIVER_NAME, DRIVER_MOBILE, TRUCK_NO, DELIVERY_REGION_CD, SHIPPED_DT, USE_YN, DEL_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{shippingMethodCd}, #{freightCompanyName}, #{driverName}, #{driverMobile}, #{truckNo}, #{deliveryRegionCd}, #{shippedDt}, 'Y', 'N', #{regId}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE SHIPPING_METHOD_CD = #{shippingMethodCd}, FREIGHT_COMPANY_NAME = #{freightCompanyName}, DRIVER_NAME = #{driverName}, DRIVER_MOBILE = #{driverMobile}, TRUCK_NO = #{truckNo}, DELIVERY_REGION_CD = #{deliveryRegionCd}, SHIPPED_DT = #{shippedDt}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT ORDER_ID, PICKUP_PLACE_CD, PICKUP_DT, CONTACT_NAME, CONTACT_MOBILE, USE_YN, DEL_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT, MOD_ID, MOD_DT FROM TB_ORDER_DELIVERY_FACTORY WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ORDER_DELIVERY_FACTORY ( ORDER_ID, PICKUP_PLACE_CD, PICKUP_DT, CONTACT_NAME, CONTACT_MOBILE, USE_YN, DEL_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{pickupPlaceCd}, #{pickupDt}, #{contactName}, #{contactMobile}, 'Y', 'N', #{regId}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE PICKUP_PLACE_CD = #{pickupPlaceCd}, PICKUP_DT = #{pickupDt}, CONTACT_NAME = #{contactName}, CONTACT_MOBILE = #{contactMobile}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW()
